name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
In Jujutsu Kaisen, all living beings emanate energy called Cursed Energy (呪力, Juryoku), which arises from negative emotions that naturally flow throughout the body. Ordinary people cannot control this flow in their bodies. As a result, they continually lose Cursed Energy, resulting in the birth of Curses (呪い, Noroi), a race of spiritual beings whose primary desire is to bring harm to humanity. These Curses are shown as gruesome monsters, ghosts, and yōkai. Jujutsu Sorcerers (呪術師, Jujutsushi, lit. "Cursed Technique Masters" or "Shamans") are people who control the flow of Cursed Energy in their bodies, allowing them to use it as they please and also to reduce its release. High-ranking Sorcerers and Curses can refine this energy and use it to perform Cursed Techniques (呪術式, Jujutsushiki), which tend to be unique to the user or their family. An advanced form of Cursed Technique is Domain Expansion (領域展開, Ryōiki Tenkai), which the users build a pocket dimension of variable size. Inside the domain, all of their attacks will always connect and grow in strength.

First RPG Bot! Please review and critique on how it can improve. Uses A LOT of tokens and I want to make sure it still works well.

LOREBOOK IS LIVE!! Hoping it helps make the bot better.

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that JJLM is still lacking in handling multiple characters' bot. Issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bugs, here. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.

--Curses Info--
1. Curse Techniques: Unique abilities possessed by curses, ranging from manipulating objects to causing harm. Cursed spirits have their own distinct curse techniques
2. Jujutsu Techniques: Skills developed by Jujutsu Sorcerers to combat curses. These techniques involve the use of cursed energy for offense, defense, or supplementary purposes
3. Cursed objects: Items infused with cursed energy that can have various effects. Some are weapons used by sorcerers, while others may attract or repel curses. They range from everyday objects to powerful artifacts.
4.Innate Techniques: Special abilities that certain individuals possess naturally, often related to their family lineage or unique circumstances
5. Cursed wombs: Locations where curses are born and gain strength. Encounters in these cursed environm
creator: Kritty_Cat
